import yfinance as yf
import signal, sys

def timeout_handler\(signum, frame\):
    print\('TIMEOUT: yf.download\(\) hung for 10 seconds'\)
    sys.exit\(1\)

signal.signal\(signal.SIGALRM, timeout_handler\)
signal.alarm\(10\)

try:
    t = yf.Ticker\('MRNA'\)
    print\('Ticker created OK'\)
    hist = t.history\(period='5d'\)
    print\('History result:'\)
    print\(hist\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(/Users/noahsmorgon/Desktop/biotech-catalyst-system/.venv/bin/python -c "
import urllib.request
import time

start = time.time\(\)
try:
    req = urllib.request.Request\('https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/MRNA?range=5d&interval=1d',
        headers={'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}\)
    resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=10\)
    print\(f'HTTP {resp.status} in {time.time\(\)-start:.1f}s'\)
    data = resp.read\(\)
    print\(f'Got {len\(data\)} bytes'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error after {time.time\(\)-start:.1f}s: {e}'\)
" 2>&1)

import yfinance as yf
import logging
import signal, sys

logging.basicConfig\(level=logging.DEBUG\)

def timeout_handler\(signum, frame\):
    import traceback
    traceback.print_stack\(frame\)
    print\('\\n\\nTIMEOUT after 15s'\)
    sys.exit\(1\)

signal.signal\(signal.SIGALRM, timeout_handler\)
signal.alarm\(15\)

t = yf.Ticker\('MRNA'\)
hist = t.history\(period='5d'\)
print\(hist\)
" 2>&1)

import yfinance as yf
import signal, sys

def timeout_handler\(signum, frame\):
    import traceback
    traceback.print_stack\(frame\)
    print\('\\n\\nTIMEOUT: yf.download\(\) hung'\)
    sys.exit\(1\)

signal.signal\(signal.SIGALRM, timeout_handler\)
signal.alarm\(15\)

print\('Calling yf.download\([\\"MRNA\\"], period=\\"5d\\"\)...'\)
df = yf.download\(['MRNA'], period='5d', progress=False\)
print\('Result:'\)
print\(df\)

import config
config.MIN_PCT_CHANGE = 3.0
from data.collector import find_daily_movers
from datetime import date, timedelta

print\(f'Found {len\(df\)} movers with 3%+ threshold'\)
